title: crisp flaky syrian lamb biryani
description: a flavorful and aromatic syrian dish made with lamb, rice, and a touch of cultured creme fraiche, finished with a crispy flaky crust.
instructions: in a large bowl, combine lamb shoulder, onion, garlic, curry powder, salt, and black pepper. mix well.
heat ghee in a large skillet over medium heat. add lamb mixture and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
in a large saucepan, combine basmati rice and 2 cups of water. bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover.
once rice is cooked, fluff with a fork and stir in cultured creme fraiche.
to make the egg wash, beat eggs with a fork in a small bowl.

to assemble the biryani, place a layer of cooked rice in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish. top with a layer of lamb mixture, followed by a layer of flaky dough (see notes). repeat this process until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of rice on top.
brush the top of the biryani with egg wash and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and crispy.
remove from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
